permission_microphone_initial.evidence: Fresh install showed microphone permission prompt before recording.

permission_denied_recovery.evidence: Permission denial showed settings recovery UI without crash.

ios_background_recording_lock.evidence: iPhone locked for 30 seconds during recording; recording continued after unlock.

ios_interruption_resume.evidence: Incoming call interrupted recording and recording resumed after call ended.

ios_bluetooth_route_change.evidence: Bluetooth route disconnect/reconnect was reflected without stopping recording.

unfinished_recording_recovery.evidence: Force-quit during recording, relaunched app, recovery dialog found saved file.

push_stt_complete.evidence: STT completion push received on registered Android and iOS test devices.

push_summary_complete.evidence: Summary completion push received on registered Android and iOS test devices.

push_failure.evidence: Forced processing failure generated error push.

push_deeplink_background.evidence: Tapped push while app was backgrounded; result screen opened.

push_deeplink_cold_start.evidence: Tapped push after force-closing app; app cold-started into result screen.

android_foreground_service.evidence: Android recording notification appeared, updated, and disappeared after stop.

android_debug_tailscale_cleartext_allowe.evidence: Debug build reached Tailscale staging HTTP endpoint successfully.

android_release_cleartext_blocked.evidence: Release build blocked external HTTP request and showed failure UI.

ios_release_http_blocked.evidence: iOS release build blocked non-HTTPS request with ATS failure path.

export_share_android.evidence: Android PDF export opened native share sheet and shared generated PDF.

export_share_ios.evidence: iOS PDF export opened native share sheet and shared generated PDF.
